case_title: CCSF-OFFICE OF TRESURER/TAX COLLECTOR VS. ANDREA VALENZUELA

docket_entries.description: THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS VIA MR. JUMA BYRD; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT ANDREA VALENZUELA. AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF, THE COURT ORDERS A DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-506).
